text:
1. First, note the time difference: US/Pacific is UTC - 8 and Asia/Tokyo is UTC + 9. So the time difference is (UTC + 9)-(UTC - 8)=17 hours.
2. Add the time difference to the given time: 11:00 + 17:00 = 28:00.
3. Adjust for the 24 - hour cycle: 28:00 - 24:00 = 04:00 (next day). So the date becomes August 20, 1489.
FINAL_ANSWER: 04:00 on August 20, 1489
